info.title: Lupira Career API
info.description: Career and professional-history backend for Lupira. Authenticate with a Bearer token issued by the OIDC provider (Authentik).

get.summary: The caller's resolved local identity (JIT-provisioned on first login).
The caller's full composed résumé (profile + engagements + projects + skills).
The caller's unified experience timeline (engagements + projects).
The caller's profile (an empty shell if none exists yet).

put.summary: Create or replace the caller's profile.

get.summary: A published portfolio (profile + engagements + projects + skills + experience + media + artifacts), filtered to public items.

Bearer.description: OIDC bearer token. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
